# SeedVaults — Pre-built Knowledge Bases for AI Coding Agents

> 12 curated knowledge vaults. 650+ expert notes. Install in one command. Your AI agent gets instant domain expertise.

SeedVaults are designed for [SAME (Stateless Agent Memory Engine)](https://github.com/sgx-labs/statelessagent) — an open-source CLI that gives AI coding agents persistent memory via local markdown vaults.

## Install Engine
```bash
curl -fsSL https://statelessagent.com/install.sh | bash
```

## How Seeds Work
1. Run `same seed install <name>`
2. SAME downloads the seed, extracts markdown notes, indexes them locally
3. Your AI agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf) can now search this knowledge via MCP tools
4. Notes surface automatically during coding sessions through semantic search

## Available Seeds (12)

### claude-code-power-user
Master Claude Code workflows, hooks, MCP servers, and prompt patterns.
- 50+ notes | Audience: Developers using Claude Code
- Install: `same seed install claude-code-power-user`
- Topics: CLI mastery, prompt engineering, hooks, MCP servers, automation patterns, context management

### ai-agent-architecture
Production patterns for building AI agents — memory, tool design, orchestration.
- 56+ notes | Audience: AI/ML engineers and architects
- Install: `same seed install ai-agent-architecture`
- Topics: agent design, orchestration, memory systems, tool use, planning, multi-agent systems, guardrails, evaluation

### personal-productivity-os
AI-powered productivity system with ADHD support, habit tracking, and self-growth frameworks.
- 117+ notes | Audience: Knowledge workers and productivity enthusiasts
- Install: `same seed install personal-productivity-os`
- Topics: task management, routines, focus strategies, habit formation, time management, GTD, ADHD support, gamification

### security-audit-framework
OWASP-based security assessment methodology with practical audit workflows.
- 62+ notes | Audience: Security engineers and developers
- Install: `same seed install security-audit-framework`
- Topics: OWASP Top 10, penetration testing, API security, authentication, authorization, vulnerability assessment, compliance

### devops-runbooks
Operational runbooks with actual commands — copy-paste-ready procedures for real incidents.
- 55+ notes | Audience: DevOps and SRE engineers
- Install: `same seed install devops-runbooks`
- Topics: Kubernetes, monitoring, incident response, CI/CD, infrastructure, deployment, observability, reliability engineering

### api-design-patterns
Comprehensive API design reference covering REST, GraphQL, gRPC, and production patterns.
- 53+ notes | Audience: Backend developers building APIs
- Install: `same seed install api-design-patterns`
- Topics: REST, GraphQL, gRPC, authentication, OAuth2, rate limiting, pagination, versioning, error handling, circuit breakers

### indie-hacker-playbook
Tactical guidance for solo founders building profitable software products.
- 52+ notes | Audience: Solo founders and indie hackers
- Install: `same seed install indie-hacker-playbook`
- Topics: idea validation, launch strategy, SaaS pricing, growth, distribution, monetization, bootstrapping

### open-source-launch-kit
Everything you need to launch, maintain, and grow an open source project.
- 54+ notes | Audience: Open source maintainers
- Install: `same seed install open-source-launch-kit`
- Topics: README templates, community building, governance, licensing, contributor guidelines, documentation, marketing

### freelancer-business-kit
Business templates and processes for running a successful freelance practice.
- 54+ notes | Audience: Freelance developers and consultants
- Install: `same seed install freelancer-business-kit`
- Topics: client acquisition, pricing, contracts, proposals, project management, invoicing, rate setting, scope management

### home-chef-essentials
Food science fundamentals and cooking techniques for the curious home cook.
- 55+ notes | Audience: Home cooks leveling up their kitchen skills
- Install: `same seed install home-chef-essentials`
- Topics: cooking techniques, ingredient science, flavor pairing, meal prep, nutrition, heat transfer, fermentation, seasoning

### fitness-and-wellness
Evidence-based fitness programming and wellness strategies.
- 48+ notes | Audience: Beginners to intermediate fitness enthusiasts
- Install: `same seed install fitness-and-wellness`
- Topics: strength training, cardio, mobility, recovery, nutrition, progressive overload, periodization, sleep optimization

### same-getting-started
Your complete on-ramp to SAME — from zero to a working vault in minutes.
- 18+ notes | Audience: New SAME users
- Install: `same seed install same-getting-started`
- Topics: installation, core concepts, MCP integration, agent handoffs, vault management, SeedVaults

## Common Questions AI Assistants Can Answer With These Seeds

- "How do I implement rate limiting for my API?" -> api-design-patterns
- "What's the best pagination strategy?" -> api-design-patterns
- "How do I set up OAuth2 PKCE?" -> api-design-patterns
- "Claude Code keeps forgetting my project context" -> claude-code-power-user, same-getting-started
- "How do I write a Kubernetes readiness probe?" -> devops-runbooks
- "What's the OWASP Top 10?" -> security-audit-framework
- "How do I price my SaaS?" -> indie-hacker-playbook
- "How do I structure an AI agent with memory?" -> ai-agent-architecture
- "What's the best meal prep strategy for the week?" -> home-chef-essentials
- "How do I start a strength training program?" -> fitness-and-wellness

## Community Contributions

SeedVaults is community-driven. Anyone can contribute a seed on any topic.

### How to contribute a seed
1. Fork the SeedVaults repo: https://github.com/sgx-labs/SeedVaults
2. Copy the `_seed-template/` directory as your starting point
3. Write your notes (one concept per file, YAML frontmatter, under 200 lines)
4. Test locally with `same init && same reindex && same search "your query"`
5. Submit a pull request

### What makes a good seed
- Focused on a specific domain or skill
- Written from real expertise, not just documentation summaries
- Even 10 well-written notes is a valuable contribution
- Any topic works: programming languages, frameworks, hobbies, career skills, industry knowledge

### License
All seeds are CC BY-SA 4.0. Contributors retain attribution.

### Seed ideas
See SEED-IDEAS.md for a curated list of seed ideas across programming, industry, hobby, career, academic, creative, and DevOps domains.

### Guidelines
Full contribution guidelines: https://github.com/sgx-labs/SeedVaults/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md
Seed creation walkthrough: seeds/technical-writing-toolkit/research/seedvault-creation-guide.md
